betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6Beekeeping & Honey§f

§aHarvest honey, beeswax, and bee grubs from the apiary.§f

The §bApiary§f with a §bQueen Bee§f produces Honeycombs, Waxcombs, Bee Grubs (edible, §e1 hunger§f), and Royal Jelly. Process combs in the §bPresser§f:
§b•§f Honeycomb → §e2× Honey§f + Grain Bait
§b•§f Waxcomb → §e2× Beeswax§f + Grain Bait

Flowers near the Apiary speed production. Hardened Leather gear can be crafted from animal drops.

§6Queen Bee§f obtained from the §bMarket§f.

§6Apiary Production§f:
§b• Base Cycle§f: §e3,500 ticks§f (≈§e2.9 minutes§f) per produce cycle.
§b• Speed Bonus§f: Each flower within §e2-block radius§f reduces cycle time by §e15%§f. A full ring of §e8 flowers§f gives maximum speed.
§b• Output§f: Honeycomb (§e35%§f), Waxcomb (§e35%§f), Bee Grub (§e30%§f) per cycle.
§b• Durability§f: Queen Bee takes §e1 damage§f per cycle. After §e36 cycles§f, the queen is consumed — replace with a new one from the Market.

§6Honey Uses§f:
§b• Food§f: Honey restores §e2 hunger§f directly.
§b• Recipes§f: Used in Honey Bread, Honey Bun, Honey Glazed Carrots, Honey Glazed Ham, Honey Soy Ribs.
§b• Marzipan§f: Honey + Almonds = Marzipan (specialty food).

§eTip§f: Set up multiple Apiaries in a flower garden to scale up honey, beeswax, and bee grub production for downstream Presser automation.
